title: ATP Pending Delivery Row
description: A row the Hub ships to a merchant in heartbeat signals (pending_deliveries[]), describing an order that has been claimed but not yet delivered/settled. The merchant side uses these rows to drive auto-delivery.

proof_id.description: Id of the delivery proof record, once one exists.

order_id.description: The order this pending delivery belongs to.

task_id.description: The GEP Task id bound to the order.

verify_mode.description: Verification mode the order was placed under.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 creation timestamp of the pending row.

task_status.description: Current status of the bound task.

result_asset_id.description: Content-hash of the result asset, once produced.

claimed_by.description: Node id that claimed the order, if any.
